pr_title: Switch primary CTA to a deeper blue
director_note: Iteration on PR #2. The contrast complaint is fixed by dropping the saturation on the dark theme and bumping luminosity on the light theme. Sign-in capture re-shot.

step_diffs.reason: CTA token was the only surface — recaptured with the new deeper blue.
Board still uses the old neutral chips.
Ship-it button keeps its own accent.
